summary: Post-arrest suppression + early 2026 data point to ~31 median for Q1 2026 IMB incidents
content:
Key findings:
- Historical Q1: 27 (2023), 33 (2024), 45 (2025) - upward trend
- 2025 surge driven by Singapore Strait (80 of 137 incidents)
- Indonesian police arrested 2 piracy gangs in July 2025
- Post-arrest: Q3 2025=26, Q4 2025=21 (major decline)
- ReCAAP: 6 incidents in first ~19 days of 2026 in Asia
- Early 2026 daily rate (0.316/day) slightly above Q4 2025 rate (0.233/day)
- Monte Carlo median: ~31, with right-skewed distribution from recovery scenarios
- Combined Bayesian + structural model gives P10=18, P50=31, P90=51
